chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2622 - وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ سِنَانٍ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «اَلْمُحْرِمُ إِذَا خَافَ لَبِسَ اَلسِّلاَحَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2622 - Abdullah ibn Sinan narrated from Abu Abdullah (as), who said:
"If a Muhrim fears for his safety, he may wear weapons."
